name: Fetal glucose utilisation per kg
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: battaglia-meschia-1986-fetal-metabolism. Technique: Umbilical-vein/artery glucose flux. Population: Late-gestation human fetus.
notes: Net glucose utilisation by the late-gestation human fetus per kilogram body weight.

name: Fetal oxygen consumption per kg
tier_rationale: Tier B pending re-review. Source citation: battaglia-meschia-1986-fetal-metabolism. Technique: Umbilical-vessel arteriovenous-difference Fick estimation. Population: Late-gestation human fetus (compiled).
notes: Whole-body oxygen consumption of the late-gestation human fetus per kilogram body weight.
